name: offboarding-permanent-en
description: Permanent auto-reply. Employee no longer available.
subject: {user} is no longer available
bodyText:
Hello,

{user} is no longer available at this mailbox as of {date}.

For any related matter, please contact {delegates}.

Kind regards.
